hibernate-mapping.query: select ca from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgency ca where ca.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and ca.Company.SourceCompanyId = :sourceCompanyId and ca.Agency.AgencyId = :agencyId and ca.IntuitResponsibilityStartDate <= :todayDate and (ca.IntuitResponsibilityEndDate is null or ca.IntuitResponsibilityEndDate >= :todayDate)

Select claw from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyLaw as claw where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and claw.CompanyAgency.Company=comp order by comp.CreatedDate,claw.CompanyAgency.Agency, cast(claw.Law.LawId as java.lang.Long)

Select claw from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyLaw as claw where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Company=comp and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and claw.CompanyAgency.Company=comp and ( (claw.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and claw.ModifiedDate < :toDate) or (claw.CompanyAgency.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and claw.CompanyAgency.ModifiedDate < :toDate) ) order by claw.CompanyAgency.Agency, cast(claw.Law.LawId as java.lang.Long)

Select depositFrequency from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EffectiveDepositFrequency as depositFrequency, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate paymentTemplate, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgency agency where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and agency.Company = comp and paymentTemplate.CompanyAgency = agency and depositFrequency.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate = paymentTemplate order by comp.SourceCompanyId,paymentTemplate.PaymentTemplate

Select distinct comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EffectiveDepositFrequency as depositFrequency, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate paymentTemplate, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgency agency where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and agency.Company = comp and paymentTemplate.CompanyAgency = agency and depositFrequency.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate = paymentTemplate and ( depositFrequency.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and depositFrequency.ModifiedDate < :toDate ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId

select ca from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgency ca, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and ca.Agency = :agency and ca.Company = comp and cs.Company = comp and ( ca.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and ca.ModifiedDate < :toDate ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId

Select depositFrequency from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EffectiveDepositFrequency as depositFrequency, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate paymentTemplate, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgency agency where comp.Id = :companyId and agency.Company = comp and paymentTemplate.CompanyAgency = agency and depositFrequency.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate = paymentTemplate order by paymentTemplate.PaymentTemplate

select capt, max(capt.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate), max(companyAgency.IntuitResponsibilityStartDate), max(companyAgency.IntuitResponsibilityEndDate) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplate capt join capt.CompanyAgency companyAgency where companyAgency.Company = :company and capt.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate is not null group by capt.Id, capt.Version, capt.CreatorId, capt.CreatedDate, capt.ModifierId, capt.ModifiedDate, capt.RealmId, capt.CompanyAgency.Id, capt.PaymentTemplate.PaymentTemplateCd, capt.AgencyTaxpayerIdEnc, capt.RecordMetadata
